reviewTitle.description: Title of the page that shows a PREreview for a preprint.

structuredReviewTitle.description: Title of the page that shows a Structured PREreview for a preprint.

requestedPrereview.description: Label shown when the PREreview was requested by someone.

liveReview.description: Label shown when the PREreview is a Live Review.

otherReviewsLink.description: Link to the page that shows all PREreviews for the preprint.

readPreprintLink.description: Link to the preprint on the preprint server.

reviewAuthors.description: Text showing the authors of the PREreview.

clubReviewAuthors.description: Text showing the authors of the PREreview and their Club.

otherAuthors.message: {otherAuthors, plural, one {# other author} other {# other authors}}
otherAuthors.description: Text for the entry in the author list indicating the number of anonymous authors.

published.description: Label for the date when the PREreview was published.

license.description: Label for the license of the PREreview.

addendumTitle.description: Heading for the section showing additions and corrections for a PREreview.

commentsTitle.description: Heading for the section showing comments on the PREreview.

noComments.message: No comments have been published yet.
noComments.description: Text shown when there are no comments on the PREreview.

commentItemTitle.message: {authors, plural, one {Comment by {author}} other {Comment by {author} et al.}}
commentItemTitle.description: Title for a comment on the review.

commentItemAuthors.description: Text showing the authors of the comment.

writeCommentButton.description: Button to write a comment on the PREreview.

prereviewRemoved.description: Heading of the page that is shown when a PREreview has been removed.

weHaveRemoved.description: Text shown alongside the heading “PREreview removed”.

havingProblems.description: Heading of the page when we’re unable to show the PREreview.

unableToShow.message: We’re unable to show the PREreview now.
unableToShow.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
